children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 1 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ().25 U.S.C. 450b1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Project
children.label: 2 Project
children.text: The term “Project” means the Indian trust asset management demonstration project established under .section 5612(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
